# AUTO-GENERATED by DI Updater Tool - do not edit by hand
# Helpers for Title Manager building operations

DI_tm_select_building_level_1_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        set_variable = { name = DI_title_manager_building_level value = 1 }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_level_1_selected_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_capital_bureau_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_capital_bureau_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = capital_bureau }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_castle_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = castle_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = castle_holding
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_castle_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = castle_04 } remove_building = castle_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_03 } remove_building = castle_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_02 } remove_building = castle_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_01 } remove_building = castle_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_city_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = city_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = city_holding
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = city_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = city_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = city_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = city_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_city_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = city_04 } remove_building = city_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = city_03 } remove_building = city_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = city_02 } remove_building = city_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = city_01 } remove_building = city_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }

                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = guild_halls_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = guild_halls_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = guild_halls_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = guild_halls_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = guild_halls_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = guild_halls_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = guild_halls_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_hospices_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = hospices_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = hospices_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = hospices_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = hospices_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = hospices_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = hospices_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = hospices_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = hospices_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = royal_garden_03 } remove_building = royal_garden_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = royal_garden_02 } remove_building = royal_garden_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = royal_garden_01 } remove_building = royal_garden_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_military_academy_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = military_academy_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = military_academy_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = military_academy_03
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_military_academy_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = military_academy_03 } remove_building = military_academy_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = military_academy_02 } remove_building = military_academy_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = military_academy_01 } remove_building = military_academy_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_march_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = march_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = march_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = march_03
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = march_03 } remove_building = march_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = march_02 } remove_building = march_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = march_01 } remove_building = march_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

    }
}

DI_tm_building_nomadic_camp_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = nomadic_camp_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_nomadic_camp_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = nomadic_camp_01 } remove_building = nomadic_camp_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_holy_site_cologne_cathedral_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {

DI_tm_building_holy_site_canterbury_cathedral_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = holy_site_canterbury_cathedral_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = holy_site_canterbury_cathedral_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = holy_site_canterbury_cathedral_03
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_holy_site_canterbury_cathedral_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = holy_site_canterbury_cathedral_03 } remove_building = holy_site_canterbury_cathedral_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = holy_site_canterbury_cathedral_02 } remove_building = holy_site_canterbury_cathedral_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = holy_site_canterbury_cathedral_01 } remove_building = holy_site_canterbury_cathedral_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_holy_site_prophetic_mosque_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = holy_site_prophetic_mosque_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_alhambra_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = alhambra_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = alhambra_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_alhambra_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = alhambra_02 } remove_building = alhambra_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = alhambra_01 } remove_building = alhambra_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_citadel_of_aleppo_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

                    limit = {

DI_tm_building_london_bridge_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = london_bridge_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_london_bridge_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = london_bridge_01 } remove_building = london_bridge_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_hagia_sophia_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = hagia_sophia_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = hagia_sophia_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_hagia_sophia_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = hagia_sophia_02 } remove_building = hagia_sophia_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = hagia_sophia_01 } remove_building = hagia_sophia_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_dome_of_the_rock_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = dome_of_the_rock_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_in_jerusalem_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_dome_of_the_rock_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = temple_in_jerusalem_01 } remove_building = temple_in_jerusalem_01 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = dome_of_the_rock_01 } remove_building = dome_of_the_rock_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_hall_of_heroes_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = hall_of_heroes_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = hall_of_heroes_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = hall_of_heroes_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = hall_of_heroes_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = hall_of_heroes_05
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_hall_of_heroes_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = hall_of_heroes_05 } remove_building = hall_of_heroes_05 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = hall_of_heroes_04 } remove_building = hall_of_heroes_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = hall_of_heroes_03 } remove_building = hall_of_heroes_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = hall_of_heroes_02 } remove_building = hall_of_heroes_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = hall_of_heroes_01 } remove_building = hall_of_heroes_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_heddal_stave_church_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = heddal_stave_church_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_heddal_stave_church_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = heddal_stave_church_01 } remove_building = heddal_stave_church_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_temple_of_uppsala_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_of_uppsala_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_of_uppsala_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_temple_of_uppsala_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = temple_of_uppsala_02 } remove_building = temple_of_uppsala_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_of_uppsala_01 } remove_building = temple_of_uppsala_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_lund_cathedral_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = lund_cathedral_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = lund_cathedral_01 } remove_building = lund_cathedral_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_palace_of_ctesiphon_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = palace_of_ctesiphon_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = palace_of_ctesiphon_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_palace_of_ctesiphon_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = palace_of_ctesiphon_02 } remove_building = palace_of_ctesiphon_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = palace_of_ctesiphon_01 } remove_building = palace_of_ctesiphon_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_tomb_of_cyrus_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = tomb_of_cyrus_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_tomb_of_cyrus_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = tomb_of_cyrus_01 } remove_building = tomb_of_cyrus_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }

                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = shah_i_zinda_02
                }
            }
        }

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = shah_i_zinda_01 } remove_building = shah_i_zinda_01 }
            }

    }

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {

                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }

                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = parthenon
                }
            }
        }
    }

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = church_of_the_theotokos } remove_building = church_of_the_theotokos }
            }
        }
    }

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }

        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

                        OR = {

                        }

                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = meteora_02

            }

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = meteora_01 } remove_building = meteora_01 }
            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_building_mount_athos_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = mount_athos_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = mount_athos_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = mount_athos_03
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_mount_athos_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = mount_athos_03 } remove_building = mount_athos_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mount_athos_02 } remove_building = mount_athos_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mount_athos_01 } remove_building = mount_athos_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = cattolica_stilo
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_cattolica_stilo_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = cattolica_stilo } remove_building = cattolica_stilo }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_qianling_mausoleum_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = qianling_mausoleum_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_qianling_mausoleum_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = qianling_mausoleum_01 } remove_building = qianling_mausoleum_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces

                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_thang_long_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_thang_long_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = citadel_thang_long_01 } remove_building = citadel_thang_long_01 }
            }
        }

}

DI_tm_building_heian_palace_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = heian_palace_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_heian_palace_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = heian_palace_01 } remove_building = heian_palace_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_shigu_academy_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = shigu_academy_01 } remove_building = shigu_academy_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_culai_academy_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = culai_academy_01
                }
            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_building_generic_copper_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_generic_copper_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_04 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_03 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_02 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_01 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_generic_silver_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }

        save_scope_as = player

            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }

                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_silver_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_silver_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {

                }

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = generic_silver_mines_02 } remove_building = generic_silver_mines_02 }

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = kremnica_mines_04 } remove_building = kremnica_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = kremnica_mines_03 } remove_building = kremnica_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = kremnica_mines_02 } remove_building = kremnica_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = kremnica_mines_01 } remove_building = kremnica_mines_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_zijinshan_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = zijinshan_mines_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = zijinshan_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = zijinshan_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = zijinshan_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_zijinshan_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = zijinshan_mines_04 } remove_building = zijinshan_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = zijinshan_mines_03 } remove_building = zijinshan_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = zijinshan_mines_02 } remove_building = zijinshan_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = zijinshan_mines_01 } remove_building = zijinshan_mines_01 }
            }
        }

            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = phnom_dek_mines_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = phnom_dek_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = phnom_dek_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = phnom_dek_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_phnom_dek_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = phnom_dek_mines_04 } remove_building = phnom_dek_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = phnom_dek_mines_03 } remove_building = phnom_dek_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = phnom_dek_mines_02 } remove_building = phnom_dek_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = phnom_dek_mines_01 } remove_building = phnom_dek_mines_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = pansjhir_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = pansjhir_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_pansjhir_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = pansjhir_mines_04 } remove_building = pansjhir_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = pansjhir_mines_03 } remove_building = pansjhir_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = pansjhir_mines_02 } remove_building = pansjhir_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = pansjhir_mines_01 } remove_building = pansjhir_mines_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2

            scope:province = {

                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }

                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = trepca_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = trepca_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {

                }
                else_if = {

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = hpakant_mines_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = hpakant_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = hpakant_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = hpakant_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_hpakant_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = hpakant_mines_04 } remove_building = hpakant_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = hpakant_mines_03 } remove_building = hpakant_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = hpakant_mines_02 } remove_building = hpakant_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = hpakant_mines_01 } remove_building = hpakant_mines_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                }

                }
                else_if = {

DI_tm_building_sado_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = sado_mines_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = sado_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = sado_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = sado_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_sado_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = sado_mines_04 } remove_building = sado_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = sado_mines_03 } remove_building = sado_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = sado_mines_02 } remove_building = sado_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = sado_mines_01 } remove_building = sado_mines_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_tada_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2

        save_scope_as = player

            variable = DI_action_provinces

                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }

                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = tada_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = tada_mines_03 } remove_building = tada_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = tada_mines_02 } remove_building = tada_mines_02 }

DI_tm_building_caravanserai_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = caravanserai }
            }
        }
    }
}

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = common_tradeport_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = common_tradeport_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = common_tradeport_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = common_tradeport_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = common_tradeport_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = common_tradeport_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = common_tradeport_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = common_tradeport_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_common_tradeport_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = common_tradeport }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = pastures_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = pastures_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = pastures_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = pastures_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = pastures_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = pastures_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = pastures_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = pastures_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                else_if = {

                else_if = {

                }
                else_if = {

                    }

                }
                else_if = {
