DI_tm_building_elephant_pens_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = elephant_pens_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = elephant_pens_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = elephant_pens_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = elephant_pens_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = elephant_pens_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = elephant_pens_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = elephant_pens_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = elephant_pens_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_elephant_pens_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = elephant_pens }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_plantations_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = plantations_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = plantations_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = plantations_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = plantations_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = plantations_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = plantations_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = plantations_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = plantations_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

            save_scope_as = province

                else_if = {

                    }

                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }

                }
                else_if = {

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }

        save_scope_as = player

            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {

                }
                else_if = {

                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }

                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_08
                }
            }
        }
    }

                else_if = {

                else_if = {

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6

        }

                }
                else_if = {

                    add_building = watchtowers_05
                }
                else_if = {

                else_if = {

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }

                else_if = {

                    }
                    add_building = workshops_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = workshops_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = workshops_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = workshops_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = workshops_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = workshops_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = workshops_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_workshops_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = workshops }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_horse_pastures_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

                }
                else_if = {

                    }
                    add_building = hillside_grazing_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = hillside_grazing_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {

                    }
                    add_building = hillside_grazing_06
                }
                else_if = {

                else_if = {

                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = hillside_grazing_08
                }
            }
        }

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = smiths_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = smiths_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = smiths_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = smiths_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = smiths_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = smiths_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = smiths_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = smiths_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_smiths_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = smiths }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_temple_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = temple_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = church_holding
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_temple_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = temple_04 } remove_building = temple_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_03 } remove_building = temple_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_02 } remove_building = temple_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_01 } remove_building = temple_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_scriptorium_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = scriptorium_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = scriptorium_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = scriptorium_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = scriptorium_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = scriptorium_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = scriptorium_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = scriptorium_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = scriptorium_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_scriptorium_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = scriptorium }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = monastic_schools_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = monastic_schools_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = monastic_schools_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = monastic_schools_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = monastic_schools_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = monastic_schools_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = monastic_schools_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = monastic_schools_08
                }
            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_building_tribe_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = tribe_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = tribal_holding
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = tribe_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = tribe_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = tribe_01 } remove_building = tribe_01 }
            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_building_idjang_forts_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = idjang_forts_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = idjang_forts_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = idjang_forts_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = idjang_forts_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_idjang_forts_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = idjang_forts_04 } remove_building = idjang_forts_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = idjang_forts_03 } remove_building = idjang_forts_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = idjang_forts_02 } remove_building = idjang_forts_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = idjang_forts_01 } remove_building = idjang_forts_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_wantilan_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wantilan_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = wantilan_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = wantilan_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = wantilan_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wantilan_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wantilan_04 } remove_building = wantilan_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wantilan_03 } remove_building = wantilan_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wantilan_02 } remove_building = wantilan_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wantilan_01 } remove_building = wantilan_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_kora_kora_yards_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = kora_kora_yards_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = kora_kora_yards_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = kora_kora_yards_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = kora_kora_yards_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

            scope:province = {

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = kora_kora_yards_03 } remove_building = kora_kora_yards_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = kora_kora_yards_02 } remove_building = kora_kora_yards_02 }

DI_tm_building_water_temples_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = water_temples_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = water_temples_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = water_temples_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = water_temples_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = water_temples_03 } remove_building = water_temples_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = water_temples_02 } remove_building = water_temples_02 }

DI_tm_building_walls_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_00
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_walls_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = walls_04 } remove_building = walls_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_03 } remove_building = walls_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_02 } remove_building = walls_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_01 } remove_building = walls_01 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_00 } remove_building = walls_00 }
            }
        }
    }
}

        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wartburg_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wartburg_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wartburg_01 } remove_building = wartburg_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_duomo_florence_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = duomo_florence_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = duomo_florence_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = duomo_florence_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = duomo_florence_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_duomo_florence_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = duomo_florence_04 } remove_building = duomo_florence_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = duomo_florence_03 } remove_building = duomo_florence_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = duomo_florence_02 } remove_building = duomo_florence_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = duomo_florence_01 } remove_building = duomo_florence_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3

DI_tm_building_mont_st_michel_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = mont_st_michel_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = mont_st_michel_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = mont_st_michel_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = mont_st_michel_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_mont_st_michel_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = mont_st_michel_04 } remove_building = mont_st_michel_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mont_st_michel_03 } remove_building = mont_st_michel_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mont_st_michel_02 } remove_building = mont_st_michel_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mont_st_michel_01 } remove_building = mont_st_michel_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = qutb_minar_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = qutb_minar_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = qutb_minar_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = qutb_minar_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_qutb_minar_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = qutb_minar_04 } remove_building = qutb_minar_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = qutb_minar_03 } remove_building = qutb_minar_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = qutb_minar_02 } remove_building = qutb_minar_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = qutb_minar_01 } remove_building = qutb_minar_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }

}

DI_tm_destroy_building_confucius_temple_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = confucius_temple_01 } remove_building = confucius_temple_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_citadel_linan_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_linan_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_citadel_linan_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = citadel_linan_01 } remove_building = citadel_linan_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_temples_angkor_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = temples_angkor_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = temples_angkor_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_temples_angkor_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = temples_angkor_02 } remove_building = temples_angkor_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temples_angkor_01 } remove_building = temples_angkor_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_temple_citadel_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_citadel_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_citadel_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_citadel_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_citadel_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_temple_citadel_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = temple_citadel_04 } remove_building = temple_citadel_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_citadel_03 } remove_building = temple_citadel_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_citadel_02 } remove_building = temple_citadel_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_citadel_01 } remove_building = temple_citadel_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_citadel_shrine_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_shrine_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_shrine_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_shrine_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_shrine_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_shrine_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_shrine_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_shrine_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_shrine_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_citadel_shrine_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = citadel_shrine }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_sacred_pool_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_sacred_pool_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = sacred_pool }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_vihara_halls_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = vihara_halls_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = vihara_halls_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = vihara_halls_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = vihara_halls_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = vihara_halls_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = vihara_halls_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = vihara_halls_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = vihara_halls_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {

DI_tm_building_mandala_capital_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = mandala_capital_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = mandala_capital_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = mandala_capital_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = mandala_capital_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = mandala_capital_05
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_mandala_capital_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = mandala_capital_05 } remove_building = mandala_capital_05 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mandala_capital_04 } remove_building = mandala_capital_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mandala_capital_03 } remove_building = mandala_capital_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mandala_capital_02 } remove_building = mandala_capital_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mandala_capital_01 } remove_building = mandala_capital_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_celestial_great_barracks_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {

                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }

            save_scope_as = province

DI_tm_building_the_great_wall_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = the_great_wall_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = the_great_wall_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = the_great_wall_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = the_great_wall_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_the_great_wall_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = the_great_wall_04 } remove_building = the_great_wall_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = the_great_wall_03 } remove_building = the_great_wall_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = the_great_wall_02 } remove_building = the_great_wall_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = the_great_wall_01 } remove_building = the_great_wall_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {

            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1

DI_tm_destroy_building_the_great_wall_liaodong_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = the_great_wall_liaodong } remove_building = the_great_wall_liaodong }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_remove_buildings_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = city_02 } add_building = city_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = city_03 } add_building = city_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = city_04 } add_building = city_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = castle_02 } add_building = castle_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = castle_03 } add_building = castle_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = castle_04 } add_building = castle_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = temple_02 } add_building = temple_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = temple_03 } add_building = temple_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = temple_04 } add_building = temple_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = tribe_02 } add_building = tribe_01 }

                if = { limit = { has_building = al_azhar_university } remove_building = al_azhar_university }
                if = { limit = { has_building = al_qarawiyyin_university_01 } remove_building = al_qarawiyyin_university_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building = alamut_castle_02 } remove_building = alamut_castle_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = alamut_castle_01 } remove_building = alamut_castle_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building = alcazar_of_segovia_01 } remove_building = alcazar_of_segovia_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building = alhambra_02 } remove_building = alhambra_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = alhambra_01 } remove_building = alhambra_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building = aljaferia_palace_01 } remove_building = aljaferia_palace_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building = allaq_mines_04 } remove_building = allaq_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = allaq_mines_03 } remove_building = allaq_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = allaq_mines_02 } remove_building = allaq_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = allaq_mines_01 } remove_building = allaq_mines_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building = ananda_temple_01 } remove_building = ananda_temple_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building = angkor_wat_01 } remove_building = angkor_wat_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building = apollinare_nuovo } remove_building = apollinare_nuovo }
                if = { limit = { has_building = archery_ranges_03 } remove_building = archery_ranges_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = archery_ranges_02 } remove_building = archery_ranges_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = archery_ranges_01 } remove_building = archery_ranges_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building = argentiera_mines_04 } remove_building = argentiera_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = argentiera_mines_03 } remove_building = argentiera_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = argentiera_mines_02 } remove_building = argentiera_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = argentiera_mines_01 } remove_building = argentiera_mines_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building = ark_of_bukhara_01 } remove_building = ark_of_bukhara_01 }

DI_max_building_upgrades_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = al_azhar_university NOT = { has_building = al_azhar_university } } add_building = al_azhar_university }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = al_qarawiyyin_university_01 NOT = { has_building = al_qarawiyyin_university_01 } } add_building = al_qarawiyyin_university_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = alamut_castle_01 NOT = { has_building = alamut_castle_02 } } add_building = alamut_castle_02 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = alcazar_of_segovia_01 NOT = { has_building = alcazar_of_segovia_01 } } add_building = alcazar_of_segovia_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = alhambra_01 NOT = { has_building = alhambra_02 } } add_building = alhambra_02 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = aljaferia_palace_01 NOT = { has_building = aljaferia_palace_01 } } add_building = aljaferia_palace_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = allaq_mines_01 NOT = { has_building = allaq_mines_04 } } add_building = allaq_mines_04 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = ananda_temple_01 NOT = { has_building = ananda_temple_01 } } add_building = ananda_temple_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = angkor_wat_01 NOT = { has_building = angkor_wat_01 } } add_building = angkor_wat_01 }
